justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple check_availability calls for each user request, which could have been more efficient.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer had to propose multiple times and days, which could be frustrating, and the agent's responses were somewhat repetitive.
